glosses.zh-Hans: 阿拉伯人; 阿拉伯语
glosses.yue: 阿拉伯人; 阿拉伯語
glosses.vi: người Ả Rập; tiếng Ả Rập
glosses.ja: アラブ人; アラビア語

sentences.target: Cette musique arabe me plaît beaucoup.

translations.fr: Cette musique arabe me plaît beaucoup.
translations.en: I really like this Arabic music.
translations.es: Esta música árabe me gusta mucho.
translations.de: Diese arabische Musik gefällt mir sehr.
translations.it: Questa musica araba mi piace molto.
translations.ko: 이 아랍 음악이 정말 마음에 들어요.
translations.zh-Hans: 我很喜欢这段阿拉伯音乐。
translations.yue: 我好鍾意呢段阿拉伯音樂。
translations.ru: Мне очень нравится эта арабская музыка.
translations.he: אני מאוד אוהב את המוזיקה הערבית הזאת.
translations.vi: Tôi rất thích bản nhạc Ả Rập này.
translations.nl: Ik vind deze Arabische muziek heel mooi.
translations.uk: Мені дуже подобається ця арабська музика.
translations.hu: Nagyon tetszik ez az arab zene.
translations.hi: मुझे यह अरबी संगीत बहुत पसंद है.
translations.pl: Bardzo podoba mi się ta arabska muzyka.
translations.el: Μου αρέσει πολύ αυτή η αραβική μουσική.
translations.nb: Jeg liker denne arabiske musikken veldig godt.
translations.id: Saya sangat menyukai musik Arab ini.
translations.sv: Jag gillar den här arabiska musiken väldigt mycket.
translations.ro: Îmi place foarte mult această muzică arabă.
translations.cs: Tato arabská hudba se mi moc líbí.
translations.da: Jeg kan rigtig godt lide denne arabiske musik.
translations.fi: Pidän tästä arabialaisesta musiikista todella paljon.
translations.ja: このアラブ音楽がとても好きです。

tokens.explanation: Demonstrative determiner, feminine singular, agreeing with 'musique'; introduces the noun phrase as a specific referent.
Common noun, feminine singular; syntactic subject of the verb 'plaît'.
Attributive adjective postposed to the noun, indicating origin/genre; invariant in gender, agrees in number; here singular modifying 'musique'.
1st-person singular clitic object pronoun; with 'plaire', marks the experiencer/indirect object; placed before the conjugated verb.
Present indicative, 3rd person singular; agrees with the subject 'Cette musique arabe'; takes an indirect object (here 'me').
Adverb of degree modifying the verb 'plaît'; intensifies the liking.

translations.vi: Bạn bè của tôi là người Ả Rập.
translations.ja: 私の友達はアラブ人です。

tokens.explanation: Possessive determiner, plural; agrees with 'amis' and marks possession by the speaker.
Common noun, masculine plural; subject of the copular clause.
Auxiliary 'être' used as a copula, present indicative, 3rd person plural; links the subject to the predicate adjective.
Predicate adjective describing the subject; plural form agreeing in number with 'amis'.

sentences.target: Je cuisine un plat arabe ce soir.
sentences.reading: /ʒə kɥizin œ̃ pla aʁab sə swaʁ/

translations.fr: Je cuisine un plat arabe ce soir.
translations.ipa: /ʒə kɥizin œ̃ pla aʁab sə swaʁ/
translations.en: I’m cooking an Arabic dish tonight.
translations.es: Esta noche cocino un plato árabe.
translations.de: Ich koche heute Abend ein arabisches Gericht.
translations.zh-Hans: 今晚我做一道阿拉伯菜。
translations.yue: 今晚我會煮一道阿拉伯菜。
translations.ru: Сегодня вечером я готовлю арабское блюдо.
translations.pt: Hoje à noite vou cozinhar um prato árabe.
translations.vi: Tối nay tôi nấu một món Ả Rập.
translations.nl: Vanavond kook ik een Arabisch gerecht.
translations.uk: Сьогодні ввечері я готую арабську страву.
translations.hi: आज रात मैं एक अरबी व्यंजन पका रहा हूँ.
translations.nb: I kveld lager jeg en arabisk rett.
translations.id: Malam ini saya memasak hidangan Arab.
translations.sv: I kväll lagar jag en arabisk rätt.
translations.da: I aften laver jeg en arabisk ret.
translations.ja: 今夜はアラブ料理を作ります。

tokens.explanation: Subject personal pronoun, 1st person singular.
Present indicative, 1st person singular; main lexical verb of the clause.
Indefinite article determiner, masculine singular; marks the noun 'plat' as non-specific.
Common noun, masculine singular; direct object of 'cuisine'.
Attributive adjective modifying 'plat', indicating origin/style; singular form.
Demonstrative determiner, masculine singular; part of the temporal noun phrase 'ce soir' functioning as a time adjunct.
Common noun, masculine; head of the temporal NP 'ce soir', which serves as an adverbial complement of time.

translations.es: Estás leyendo una novela en árabe.
translations.de: Du liest einen Roman auf Arabisch.
translations.it: Stai leggendo un romanzo in arabo.
translations.zh-Hans: 你在读一本阿拉伯语小说。
translations.yue: 你喺睇一本阿拉伯文小說。
translations.pt: Você está lendo um romance em árabe.
translations.vi: Bạn đang đọc một tiểu thuyết bằng tiếng Ả Rập.
translations.nl: Je leest een roman in het Arabisch.
translations.hi: तुम अरबी में एक उपन्यास पढ़ रहे हो.
translations.nb: Du leser en roman på arabisk.
translations.id: Kamu sedang membaca sebuah novel dalam bahasa Arab.
translations.sv: Du läser en roman på arabiska.
translations.da: Du læser en roman på arabisk.
translations.ja: あなたはアラビ아語の小説を読んでいます。

tokens.explanation: Subject personal pronoun, 2nd person singular (informal).
Present indicative, 2nd person singular; main verb of the clause.
Indefinite article determiner, masculine singular; introduces the direct object 'roman'.
Common noun, masculine singular; direct object of 'lis'.
Attributive adjective postposed to 'roman'; specifies language/origin; singular form.
